suggestions.rationale: bal-devnet-4 became Glamsterdam DevNet 0 with target launch end of last week (April 20). Need status update on actual deployment, client readiness with execution-apis PR #770, and any blockers encountered.

suggestions.topic: ePBS range sync security analysis results
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #78 assigned EL teams to analyze security implications of CL syncing without payload envelopes. This is a critical security question affecting ePBS devnet progression and needs resolution before further devnet work.

bal-devnet-3 broke on gas accounting disagreements (state gas reservoir overflow). bal-devnet-4/Glamsterdam DevNet 0 includes full EIP-8037 with dynamic state costs. Critical to confirm whether these issues are resolved in the new implementation.

suggestions.topic: ePBS devnet-2 planning and beacon state changes
suggestions.rationale: epbs-devnet-1 has been broken since launch. ACDT #77 mentioned devnet-2 planned after beacon state changes. Need update on what changes are required and timeline for devnet-2.

suggestions.topic: Blob Delta Serum devnet expansion beyond Prysm/Lighthouse
suggestions.rationale: Only Prysm and Lighthouse deployed with partial cells. Need status on when other CL clients (Teku, Lodestar, Nimbus) will join, and progress toward full testnet deployment.

Batch I/O prefetch flag urgently requested from Nethermind and Erigon in ACDT #75 for benchmarking. No confirmation of completion in subsequent meetings. Benchmarking data needed to validate BAL performance claims.

suggestions.topic: SFI (Considered for Inclusion) criteria and candidate EIPs
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #74 deferred SFI decisions to ACD and requested Spencer to draft PR updating EIP-7723 criteria. No follow-up in subsequent meetings. If draft PR exists, ACDT should review before presenting to ACD.

CL teams assigned to review proposal preference SSE event (PR #593) and envelope creation API (PR #584) in ACDT #76. No follow-up on review status. These may be blocking ePBS external builder API work.
